---
title: "World Cup 2026 Forecast"
date: "2026-04-21"
output: ioslides_presentation
---

## 2026 World Cup Win Probability

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(plotly)

countries <- c("Argentina", "France", "Brazil", "England")
probabilities <- c(35, 30, 20, 15)

plot_ly(x = countries, y = probabilities, type = 'bar', 
        marker = list(color = c('lightblue', 'darkblue', 'yellow', 'red'))) %>%
  layout(yaxis = list(title = "Probability (%)"),
         xaxis = list(title = "Semi-finalists"))
```
